name: Margherita Pizza
description: Classic Italian pizza with fresh tomato, mozzarella and basil.

name: Grilled Chicken Bowl
description: Juicy grilled chicken with quinoa, avocado and roasted veggies.

name: Vegan Buddha Bowl
description: Colorful mix of roasted chickpeas, sweet potato, kale and tahini.

name: Beef Burger
description: Juicy smash burger with cheddar, caramelized onions and pickles.

name: Caesar Salad
description: Crispy romaine, parmesan, croutons and house Caesar dressing.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: Slow-cooked beef ragu with al dente spaghetti and fresh parmesan.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy falafel, hummus, fresh veggies and tzatziki in a warm pita.

name: Chicken Tacos
description: Spiced grilled chicken, pico de gallo, avocado and lime crema.
